_meta.stability: Frozen for the loom-generation lifetime per ADR-002.
_meta.relation_to_classic: Classic GET /api/issue/{id}/files (singular path) returns a bare list of IssueFileAssociation rows. Loom uses /issues/{id}/files (plural, symmetric with the /issues collection) and wraps in ListResponse[FileAssocLoom] (assoc_id replaces id at the row's primary key; cross-entity refs file_id and issue_id keep their names).

shape_decl.rationale: Validates parent issue exists upfront (db.get_issue_files does not validate).

examples.name: issue_not_found
examples.note: Missing issue id → 404. Loom validates upfront unlike db.get_issue_files, matching classic /api/issue/{id}/files behavior.
